MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
James Kraus (415-956-8100) of Zacks, Freedman and Patterson for Divisadero Place Home Owners' Association, et al.
Brian Crossman, Deputy City Attorney (415-554-4690) for RESPONDENTS/Moving party SAN FRANCISCO DEPARTMENT OF BUILDING INSPECTION, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, and SAN FRANCISCO ABATEMENT APPEALS BOARD.
Mark Allen (415-981-5411) of Bledsoe, Diestel, Treppa & Crane LLP for Petitioners.
Mike Fox (510-548-8081 / 415-371-8000) of Triano & Byrne for Intervenors.
Andrew Oberst (707-427-3998) for Plaintiff/Cross Complaiant 2856-62 Washington St. HOA, et al., via Court Call

Hearing is held concurrently with RESPONDENTS SAN FRANCISCO DEPARTMENT OF BUILDING INSPECTION, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, and SAN FRANCISCO ABATEMENT APPEALS BOARD'S Demurrer To Intervenors' Amended Complaint In Intervention .
